sections.paragraph: m. pl. tumours of the anus, hæmorrhoidal mariscœ, protruding from the anus (see טָחַר ), protruding through tenesmus in voiding. 1Sa 6:11, 17 1Sa 6:17and Deu 28:27 1Sa 5:6, 1Sa 5:9, in קרי for עֲפָלִים כתיב which seems to have been thought a less decent word. Hence Syriac ܛܚܰܪ to surffer from tenesmus, ܛܚܪܳܐܳ, ܛܚܘܽܪܳܐ tenesmus with flow of blood, Arabic زحير.
